response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed the video content. 2. Identified continuous instrumental BGM throughout the gameplay. 3. Evaluated if the background music contained vocals. Confirmed it is an instrumental BGM track commonly used in Minecraft videos. 4. Set contains_vocal_music to false for all segments as no vocal music was found.
response.global_summary: A video of a VTuber playing Minecraft with instrumental background music playing throughout the entire gameplay. There is no vocal music detected.

scenes.description: The VTuber is playing Minecraft in a copper-themed room. Instrumental BGM is playing. The VTuber talks to her audience, complaining about pigs and zombies.
